summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions Configurator Platform MVP. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate), frontend UI working with excellent drag & drop functionality, real-time quote calculation, and proper RECRA branding. Minor UX improvements needed for AI recommendations and canvas controls.

design_issues.issue: Refresh AI button is disabled until project is saved with products placed
Rotate and delete controls for placed items are not easily discoverable

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns welcome message with RECRA branding
Backend API /api/products returns exactly 19 seeded products
Backend API /api/products/category/{category} filters correctly for all 7 categories
Backend API POST /api/projects creates new project successfully
Backend API PUT /api/projects/{id} updates project with placed products
Backend API POST /api/quote/calculate returns accurate CAPEX/OPEX calculations
Backend API POST /api/ai/recommendations returns rule-based recommendations
Backend API POST /api/quote/pdf generates HTML with RECRA branding
Frontend loads with RECRA branding and dark theme
Wizard navigation between all 4 steps (Project, Terrain, Products, Quote)
Project name input accepts custom project names
Project type selection works for all 4 types
Number of spots input accepts numeric values
Product category filter dropdown filters products correctly
Product cards display with proper icons, descriptions, and pricing
Drag & drop from product cards to canvas places items with snap-to-grid
Real-time quote updates when products are placed (CAPEX: €50,500, OPEX: €1,200)
Save project button successfully saves project to backend
PDF export button generates and opens quote PDF
No JavaScript errors detected on page
